summary: Iteration 22: UI/Navigation Changes Testing Complete - All backend tests pass (11/11), All frontend features verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 verified all 6 UI/navigation changes requested by the user. Only one agent exists now (Anima Fund) after TestSkills was deleted. Key features: (1) Genesis screen has selectable agent buttons with Anima Fund selected by default, (2) + Create button opens Create Agent modal with 'Genesis' submit button, (3) Go to Dashboard button in top-right of genesis, (4) Conway Account panel clickable when connected to toggle to edit mode, (5) VM tier selector shows 5 tiers, (6) Dashboard header has Genesis and Wallet pill buttons, (7) LIVE/SSE indicator visible, (8) Agent dropdown shows correct selected agent.

genesis_screen.agent_list_with_selectable_buttons: PASS - Shows 'Anima Fund' button (only agent after TestSkills deletion)
genesis_screen.create_button: PASS - '+ Create' button opens Create Agent modal
genesis_screen.go_to_dashboard_button: PASS - Button in top-right navigates to dashboard
genesis_screen.conway_account_connected_state: PASS - Shows 'Connected' with '$0.00' and key prefix
genesis_screen.conway_key_edit_toggle: PASS - Clicking 'Connected' area switches to input mode
genesis_screen.vm_tier_selector: PASS - Shows all 5 tiers (Small, Medium, Large, X-Large, 2X-Large)

dashboard_header.genesis_pill_button: PASS - Rocket icon + 'Genesis' text, navigates to genesis screen
dashboard_header.wallet_pill_button: PASS - Wallet icon + 'Wallet' text, navigates to wallet page
dashboard_header.live_sse_indicator: PASS - Wifi icon visible with 'LIVE' or 'POLL' status
dashboard_header.agent_dropdown: PASS - Shows 'Anima Fund' with green dot (running status)
dashboard_header.agent_dropdown_options: PASS - Shows agent options and '+ Create New Agent'

create_agent_modal.opens_from_genesis: PASS - Modal opens when clicking '+ Create' button
create_agent_modal.redirects_to_genesis: PASS - After creation, redirects to genesis for provisioning

features_verified.navigation_state_preservation: PASS - Navigation between genesis and dashboard preserves selected agent state

backend_apis_tested: POST /api/credits/set-key - Rejects invalid format, rejects invalid Conway keys, accepts valid key
